title: englerina kwaiensis
intro: Englerina kwaiensis, also known as Englerina, is a plant species in the family Apocynaceae, commonly found in tropical regions. The plant has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, particularly its antimalarial and antibacterial properties, which have been found to be effective in treating various health conditions. Englerina kwaiensis has been reported to have health benefits such as reducing inflammation, fever, and pain, as well as exhibiting antioxidant and antimicrobial activities. The plant is typically prepared as a decoction or infusion for medicinal use, and its extracts are also used in herbal preparations to treat various ailments.
